claims.evidence_text: HTS damages membranes of chloroplast and decreases the efficiency of photosystem-II, reduces the activity state of RuBisCO, induces senescence during grain-filling stage that in turn reduces grain-filling time.
claims.claim_summary: High-temperature stress induces senescence during the grain-filling stage and shortens grain-filling time, identifying grain filling (and anthesis) as heat-sensitive stages in wheat.
